author: lOrm
content: Phase 1 behavioral spec for memdir (background memory agents, MEMORY.md entrypoint, extractMemories). Issue body shows partial spec scope (MEMORY.md entrypoint + truncation) was started. Remaining behavior contracts need CC TS reading. Not addressable in this cleanup session: external-source research. Phase 2 implementation #548 is the code phase blocked by this spec. Feature umbrella is #508. Owner-level external research.
